subject: families are being torn apart
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY **BOLDPAC** AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
---
Friends, I have breaking news:

**[Today,](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea4ee/e60883a/715216ac/1442a380/3226669335/VEsH/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/SCOTUS-Immigration?source=MS_EM_PET_2016.01.19_B1_scotus-immigration_X__F1_S3_C1__ns") the Supreme Court has agreed to hear a case that could finally allow President Obama's executive orders on immigration to be implemented.**

In 2014, in the midst of an immigration crisis, President Obama issued a much-needed executive action to stop the deportation of nearly 4 million immigrants -- particularly those who came to this country as children or those with immediate family members that have citizenship -- in an effort to keep immigrant families from being split apart.

_But last year, this order was blocked by a Texas federal judge._

Now, the Supreme Court has a chance to overturn this appalling decision, and finally give these hardworking families some peace of mind knowing they won't be torn from their loved ones at bureaucratic will.

[Join me and sign your name urging the Supreme Court to implement President Obama's executive order on immigration >>](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea4ee/e60883a/715216ac/1442a380/3226669335/VEsE/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/SCOTUS-Immigration?source=MS_EM_PET_2016.01.19_B1_scotus-immigration_X__F1_S3_C1__ns")

Friends, the President's immigration program was designed to provide temporary relief until Congress passes comprehensive immigration reform.

But Speaker Paul Ryan has already declared he will refuse to _even consider_ immigration reform while President Obama is in office.

So right now, this becomes a question of who we are as a nation: Are we a country that welcomes those who desperately need refuge, or do we turn them away?

**[Today, the Supreme Court has a chance to reaffirm the values of tolerance and acceptance that have made this country great. Will you join me in urging them to make the right decision?](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea4ee/e60883a/715216ac/1442a380/3226669335/VEsF/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/SCOTUS-Immigration?source=MS_EM_PET_2016.01.19_B1_scotus-immigration_X__F1_S3_C1__ns")**

[http://go.boldpac.com/SCOTUS-Immigration](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea4ee/e60883a/715216ac/1442a380/3226669335/VEsC/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/SCOTUS-Immigration?source=MS_EM_PET_2016.01.19_B1_scotus-immigration_X__F1_S3_C1__ns")

Thanks for taking action,

Tony

Congressman Tony Cardenas
CHC BOLD PAC Chairman

220 I St. NE, Suite 280
Washington, DC 20002

name: Jeanette Rubio
subject: Marco needs your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45866174:JINAyurNQ:m:1:1349778030:95025D8E54D61EFD856F447866DC5B93:r)
---
| | | | Peter, This past year has been nothing short of incredible. Our family has traveled across the country, meeting Americans from every walk of life and hearing their own American Dream stories and goals for their lives and their children's. And, Peter, I've learned and seen a lot from traveling the country and watching my husband campaign over the last year. Our great nation is sitting on the brink of complete disaster. Our economy is weak, America's values are eroding, and the future of our country under our current leadership looks bleak. **But, Peter, we have a rare opportunity this year to change this. We have a chance to right the wrongs done by President Obama and his Democrat allies in Congress. But we will only be able to turn our country around and restore the great values into our nation if we elect my husband, Marco Rubio.** Marco is the only candidate who has both the experience needed and the plans outlined to make real conservative change from Day One. Peter, if you are like me, you worry about the character of the nation that we will leave for our children. You wonder if they will grow up in a prosperous, free nation with strong values or always live in a country that overtaxes its citizens and restricts their liberties. I know that when Marco is president, those worries will go away. Our nation is in desperate need of Marco's leadership, and I hope you will join me in supporting him right now. [**Become a Marco Rubio supporter by making a donation of $25, $50, $75 or more right now.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45866175:JINAyurNQ:m:1:1349778030:95025D8E54D61EFD856F447866DC5B93:r)
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45866175:JINAyurNQ:m:1:1349778030:95025D8E54D61EFD856F447866DC5B93:r)
---
| Peter, the next 11 months are not going to be easy. Many are looking at the support Marco has, and hopeful to see him defeated. In fact, no one would love to see Marco lose more than Hillary Clinton. Marco is the best candidate to defeat Hillary. But he cannot defeat her unless he first has your support. **Peter, we cannot afford to jeopardize our future by not acting in the next 11 months. The actions we take today will impact the outcome of November's election.[ If you want to live in a stronger, more prosperous world that is better for our children, then you must support Marco Rubio.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45866175:JINAyurNQ:m:1:1349778030:95025D8E54D61EFD856F447866DC5B93:r)** On behalf of my family, thank you so much for the support you've already shown. Campaigning and politics is at times not pretty, but we stay strong knowing we have you by our side. Thank you. I hope to see you out on the campaign trail soon!Jeanette Rubio
P.S. **Marco's campaign is fueled by the support of friends like yourself. If it weren't for all of the donations received from emails like this one, we wouldn't have a campaign at all.** Please keep our campaign strong and allow Marco to continue his momentum by making an urgently needed contribution right now. [**Follow this link to make a secure online donation right away.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45866175:JINAyurNQ:m:1:1349778030:95025D8E54D61EFD856F447866DC5B93:r)

name: Rand Paul
subject: Can he be TrusTed?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot,

With time running out before the Iowa
Caucuses, Senator Ted Cruz is as busy as ever playing politics.

Sadly -- whether it's Audit the Fed, ties to
Wall Street, government spying or foreign policy -- I'm afraid
it's our Liberty Movement that's getting played.

Patriot, will you please agree to your most
generous contribution in support of my campaign's Caucus Takeover
Money Bomb right away?

With so much at stake in 2016 for our
country, we simply can't afford to get this one wrong.

We need a President who we can trust. We
need a President who means it when they promise to defend our
liberty.

Sadly, Senator Ted Cruz has just not been an
authentic, genuine voice when it comes to defending liberty.

For example, since even before his election
to the U.S. Senate, Senator Cruz pledged to help me Audit the
Fed.

Then, when I finally forced a U.S. Senate
vote on Audit the Fed -- after fighting side-by-side the Liberty
Movement for five years -- Senator Cruz couldn't be bothered to
show up.

He was too busy campaigning.

Now we're learning he failed to disclose a
large loan from Goldman Sachs, and his other ties to Wall Street
are coming to light as well.

It's hard not to wonder if his claims to
support Audit the Fed aren't just a bunch of hot air --
especially given his actions on other issues.

Last year, when I took on the fight to force
Section 215 of the so-called "PATRIOT Act" to expire -- the
section of federal code the NSA used to justify their bulk
collection of innocent Americans' phone records -- Senator Cruz
claimed to be advocate for reform.

Then, despite my loud objections, he voted to
pass the so-called "USA Freedom Act."

Just weeks ago, in a debate exchange with
Senator Rubio, we found out why. It had nothing to do with
reform.

Senator Cruz stated he supported the USA
Freedom Act because "The old program only covered 20 to 30
percent of phone numbers . . . The new program covers nearly
100%."

That's right. Senator Cruz admitted he's for
more spying and more data collection on American citizens.

He's also called for making "sand glow in the
dark" in the Middle East.

After the foreign policy disasters of the
last two Presidents, the last thing we need are more military
interventions that only work to embolden radical Islamists like
ISIS.

It's time for the boots on the ground in the
Middle East to be Arab boots on the ground -- not Americans'.

We've gotten precious little in return for
the precious lives and resources.

I know the Liberty Movement understands that.

I also know Senator Cruz doesn't.

Yet, he continues to flip-flop on central
issues to try and fuel his political ambition.

Patriot, we can't let ourselves get played.

There's just too much at stake.

If you agree, please make your most generous
contribution of $100, $50, $25 or even $10 to my campaign's
Caucus Takeover Money Bomb right away.

In liberty,
Rand Paul

$25 MONEYBOMB >>

$50 MONEYBOMB >>

$75 MONEYBOMB >>

$100 MONEYBOMB >>

Or donate another
amount >>

He was too busy campaigning. Now we're learning he failed to disclose a large loan from Goldman Sachs, and his other ties to Wall Street are coming to light as well. It's hard not to wonder if his claims to support Audit the Fed aren't just a bunch of hot air -- especially given his actions on other issues. Last year, when I took on the fight to force Section 215 of the so-called "PATRIOT Act" to expire -- the section of federal code the NSA used to justify their bulk collection of innocent Americans' phone records -- Senator Cruz claimed to be advocate for reform. Then, despite my loud objections, he voted to pass the so-called "USA Freedom Act." Just weeks ago, in a debate exchange with Senator Rubio, we found out why. It had nothing to do with reform. Senator Cruz stated he supported the USA Freedom Act because "The old program only covered 20 to 30 percent of phone numbers . . . The new program covers nearly 100%." That's right. Senator Cruz admitted he's for more spying and more data collection on American citizens. He's also called for making "sand glow in the dark" in the Middle East. After the foreign policy disasters of the last two Presidents, the last thing we need are more military interventions that only work to embolden radical Islamists like ISIS. It's time for the boots on the ground in the Middle East to be Arab boots on the ground -- not Americans'. We've gotten precious little in return for the precious lives and resources. I know the Liberty Movement understands that. I also know Senator Cruz doesn't. Yet, he continues to flip-flop on central issues to try and fuel his political ambition. Patriot, we can't let ourselves get played. There's just too much at stake. If you agree, please make your most generous contribution of $100, $50, $25 or even $10 to my campaign's Caucus Takeover Money Bomb right away. name: Ben Carson
subject: Yesterday, tragedy struck our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
Peter,

Yesterday in Iowa, tragedy struck the Carson for President
family. As a result, we decided to temporarily suspend campaign
activities until Thursday.

A van transporting three volunteers and one of our campaign
staffers hit a patch of ice and flipped on its side where it was
struck by another vehicle.

We are thankful that three of the passengers, Drew McCall, Aaron
Ohnemus and Ryan Patrick Shellooe, were treated and released from
the hospital.

Braden Joplin, a 25-year-old volunteer from Midland, Texas and a
student at Texas Tech, was transported to Nebraska for additional
treatment.

Tragically, he passed away at the hospital.

I had the privilege of knowing Braden Joplin personally, and am
filled with a deep and profound sadness at his passing.

A presidential candidate asks a lot of his or her volunteers,
working long hours in the cold, under-appreciated. They are the
unsung heroes of the political process. The outpouring of support
for Braden and his family from fellow candidates, as well as
their staffs and volunteers, demonstrates that life will always
transcend politics, and I thank them for their kind words.

Even after more than 30 years of experience counseling parents
and family members in the most difficult of times, it never gets
easier. But I find solace in the knowledge of God's redeeming
grace, and I pray that Braden's family finds comfort in the mercy
of the Lord.

To help lift up Braden's family, we are going to be sending them
a collection of thoughts, prayers and kind words from my
supporters around the country. After all, Braden was working
tirelessly on behalf of all of us, helping to build a better
future for our families and loved ones.

To submit your thoughts and prayers to Braden's family, please go
here now.
www.bencarson.com/hubfs/card/braden.html?v3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com

One of the precious few joys of campaigning is the privilege of
meeting bright young men and women who are so enthusiastic about
their country that they will freely give of their time and energy
to work on its behalf. Braden was one of those bright young men.

Thank you for joining my wife Candy and I, as well as the entire
Carson for President family as we reflect on the preciousness of
life and remember and honor the memory of Braden Joplin.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

Paid for by Carson America, Inc.

Carson America, Inc | P.O. Box 26261 |
Alexandria, VA 22313

Paid for by
Carson America, Inc.

Candidates promising to go to Washington and
fight for change. But where has it been getting us? They go right
to DC to do what everyone has always done.

And in a bipartisan effort, we've been handed

and actually get the government out of your life?

can't get fooled again. There's too much at stake.

Will you please help Rand's campaign run the

name: Rand Paul
subject: My plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot,

As the candidate attacks increase, the race
for the Republican nomination is getting more volatile by the
day.

I've laid our my plan to DEFEAT the
Washington machine for you below.

Now, I'm counting on your help to ensure I
keep my message of liberty in front of Iowa voters during this
most critical time.

Will you agree to your most generous
contribution of $100, $50, $25 or even $10 to help my campaign
reach our $100,000 goal by midnight on Friday?

I believe we have the plan to shock people on
February 1. But I'm counting on your support for this critical
Caucus Takeover Money Bomb!

In 2010, I ran for office because I was tired
of being misled by Republicans who promised conservative
government and instead gave us bank bailouts and more debt.

I was tired of watching Wall Street profit at
the expense of Main Street with each and every new round of
Washington's tax-and-spend and tax-and-print policies.

WHERE ARE THE FISCAL CONSERVATIVES?

The Tea Party Movement has grown
exponentially over the past five years, but Congress hasn't
changed a bit.

We now spend roughly $7 million per minute
and face a debt of almost $19 trillion!

As a result, a smaller percentage of the
United States is working now than at any time since the Jimmy
Carter administration.

More Americans are projected to have been
laid off last year than at any time since the Great Recession.

GOP BIG SPENDING CONTINUES

Yet, the Republican-controlled Congress
recently passed yet another fiscally irresponsible omnibus bill,
which will add $700 billion in new debt.

Some $3 trillion comes in to the U.S.
Treasury in taxes. Couldn't we survive on just $3 trillion?

We've spent taxpayers' money on everything
from an unusable $43 million gas station in Afghanistan to a $15
million grant allowing a golf club maker to do research in space.

Don't you think there might be some room for
cuts within our budget?

What's even worse than your representatives
agreeing to $700 billion in new debt is the fact that they didn't
even know what they were spending the money on!

Speaker Ryan's omnibus bill was 2,242 pages
long, and it wasn't plopped onto congressional desks until a
couple of days before the vote was scheduled - giving Members of
Congress just days to sift through thousands of pages of
complicated legislation.

In hindsight, one thing is for certain: This
spending bill was a Democrat's pipe dream, and Republican
lawmakers let it become law.

Republicans also allowed the Obama
administration to extend cutthroat environmental regulations over
the private property of our farmers, ranchers and businessmen.

Many farmers and ranchers will now be faced
with costly permits and evaluation fees for the man-made ditches
that exist on their own property.

Lawsuits in at least 31 states have sprung up
as a result of this controversial EPA rule, and yet your
Republican-controlled Congress let it slide right past them.

And that's not all.

This 2,242-page spending bill fully funds
Obamacare and sanctuary cities, while also granting $1.6 billion
for the president's refugee program - bringing an additional
15,000 refugees from high-risk areas into this country, all while
failing to improve the vetting process.

I believe that a lot of these negative bills
pass through Washington because our congressional representatives
don't have enough time to see what is inside of them.

READ THE BILLS

That's why I introduced the Read the Bills
Act - so that our representatives have the opportunity to govern
as effectively as possible.

If passed, this legislation would require
Congress to delay votes by one day for every 20 pages of
legislation.

BREAK THE BIPARTISAN BIG SPENDING ALLIANCE

Another big problem in Washington is that
there is an unholy alliance between right and left that comes
together to spend more of your money at every turn.

Conservatives want more military spending.
Liberals want more domestic spending.

As a result, they shake hands and agree to
spend more on everything.

Congress will never balance the budget unless
we force them to do so.

PASS A BALANCED BUDGET AMENDMENT

That's why I have repeatedly called for a
Balanced Budget Amendment to the Constitution.

We cannot trust our careless, fiscally
irresponsible bureaucrats to slow spending on their own, so we
should force them to do so.

But we will never pass a Balanced Budget
Amendment with the Old Guard in charge.

PASS TERM LIMITS FOR CONGRESS

To take our country back from the special
interests that keep spending more of our money at every turn, we
are going to need to fumigate the Capitol with term limits.

We already limit the president to two terms;
it's about time we start limiting the terms of Congress as well.

Once we send these career politicians
packing, new, fresh ideas will finally begin to permeate
throughout the system.

Throughout my first term in Congress, fiscal
responsibility hasn't increased much in Washington.

But if I've noticed anything on the campaign
trail, it's that the American populace has grown increasingly
tired of Congress' antics, and that Tea Party movement is growing
bigger and bolder every day.

With your help, I am confident that we will
soon be able to pressure Congress into enacting common sense
reforms that will finally restore fiscal sanity to our nation's
checkbook.

Patriot, will you please agree to your most
generous contribution of $100, $50, $25 or even $10 to help us
reach our $100,000 goal by Friday at midnight?

This is crunch time. Please act IMMEDIATELY.

In liberty,
Rand Paul

$75 MONEYBOMB >>

$100 MONEYBOMB>>

Or donate another
amount >>

Lawsuits in at least 31 states have sprung up as a result of this controversial EPA rule, and yet your Republican-controlled Congress let it slide right past them. And that's not all. This 2,242-page spending bill fully funds Obamacare and sanctuary cities, while also granting $1.6 billion for the president's refugee program - bringing an additional 15,000 refugees from high-risk areas into this country, all while failing to improve the vetting process. I believe that a lot of these negative bills pass through Washington because our congressional representatives don't have enough time to see what is inside of them. READ THE BILLS That's why I introduced the Read the Bills Act - so that our representatives have the opportunity to govern as effectively as possible. If passed, this legislation would require Congress to delay votes by one day for every 20 pages of legislation. BREAK THE BIPARTISAN BIG SPENDING ALLIANCE Another big problem in Washington is that there is an unholy alliance between right and left that comes together to spend more of your money at every turn. Conservatives want more military spending. Liberals want more domestic spending. As a result, they shake hands and agree to spend more on everything. Congress will never balance the budget unless we force them to do so. PASS A BALANCED BUDGET AMENDMENT That's why I have repeatedly called for a Balanced Budget Amendment to the Constitution. We cannot trust our careless, fiscally irresponsible bureaucrats to slow spending on their own, so we should force them to do so. But we will never pass a Balanced Budget Amendment with the Old Guard in charge. PASS TERM LIMITS FOR CONGRESS To take our country back from the special interests that keep spending more of our money at every turn, we are going to need to fumigate the Capitol with term limits. We already limit the president to two terms; it's about time we start limiting the terms of Congress as well. Once we send these career politicians packing, new, fresh ideas will finally begin to permeate throughout the system. Throughout my first term in Congress, fiscal responsibility hasn't increased much in Washington. But if I've noticed anything on the campaign trail, it's that the American populace has grown increasingly tired of Congress' antics, and that Tea Party movement is growing bigger and bolder every day. With your help, I am confident that we will soon be able to pressure Congress into enacting common sense reforms that will finally restore fiscal sanity to our nation's checkbook. Patriot, will you please agree to your most generous contribution of $100, $50, $25 or even $10 to help us reach our $100,000 goal by Friday at midnight? This is crunch time. Please act IMMEDIATELY. name: Rand Paul
subject: The Gollum of 2016
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot,

In many ways, the campaign for the Republican
nomination for President of the United States has reminded me of
one of my favorite movie series.

Lord of the Rings.

You may recall the character Gollum. Gollum
was a man who become corrupted by absolute power, and became
obsessed with obtaining the "Ring of Power, the ring to rule them
all".

Donald Trump shares Gollum's unquenchable
thirst for absolute power and to rule over Mordor. Or in this
case, Washington, D.C.

Patriot, you and I must do everything that we
can stop Gollum from gaining the Ring of Power.

Will you donate anything you can afford to
help my campaign?

You may also recall there is a scene in the
last movie, where Aragorn is leading his men into battle against
Suaron and his Orc armies.

He tells them this before the battle:

"I see in your eyes the same fear that would
take the heart of me. A day may come when the courage of men
fails, when we forsake our friends and break all bonds of
fellowship, but it is not this day… Today we fight!"

As we approach the Iowa Caucus, your support
means more than ever.

Together, we can defeat Donald Trump, win the
Iowa Caucus and defeat the Washington Machine. Donate anything
you can today.

I am counting on you.

In liberty,
Rand Paul

body:
| | **ADD YOUR NAME >>> NO CORPORATE TAKEOVER OF OUR ELECTIONS **
**Goal:** 5,000 Signatures
**Status of dpwillis67@gmail.com:[PENDING](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c1b/70cdc2ba/47b8ebc7/3965e2f/4066587777/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/get-dark-money-out-?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+PENDING&utm_campaign=em121015_Gun&source=em121015_Gun") **
---

Corporations and Super PACs should NOT be able to buy and sell elections. Yet, thanks to the disastrous decision in _Citizens United vs. FEC_ , that's exactly what is happening. **[And we need your help to stop this trend.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c1b/70cdc2ba/47b8ebc7/3965e2c/4066587777/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/get-dark-money-out-?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+And+we+need+your+help+to+stop+this+trend&utm_campaign=em121015_Gun&source=em121015_Gun")**

With the anniversary of _Citizens United vs. FEC_ coming up this week, it's never been clearer that this is the time to get big money out of our elections. Democracy should not be up for sale to the highest bidder, yet the influx of cash from Super PACs gives outsiders the power to hijack an election.

I've been leading the charge on this issue for years, from authoring the DISCLOSE Act to filing lawsuits in federal courts. But I can't do it alone, and I need your help today.

**[We must gather 5,000 signatures before the anniversary TOMORROW calling for an end to Citizens United and the SuperPac takeover of elections--will you click here and add your name?](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c1b/70cdc2ba/47b8ebc7/3965e2d/4066587777/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/get-dark-money-out-?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+We+must+gather+5000+signatures+before+th&utm_campaign=em121015_Gun&source=em121015_Gun")**

Our opponent, in fact, has a Super PAC pumping out of state money into this Maryland election --they've already spent over $1 million on television ads--and we still have weeks to go! It's only going to get worse from here.

**[Add your name now to my petition to help us get to 5,000 signatures before tomorrow. We really need you.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c1b/70cdc2ba/47b8ebc7/3965e2a/4066587777/VEsC/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/get-dark-money-out-?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+Add+your+name+now+to+my+petition+to+help&utm_campaign=em121015_Gun&source=em121015_Gun")**

Friends, America's gun problem is out of control.

Over 30 people on average are murdered by guns every day in the United States. And the truth is, the suicide rate involving guns is almost double that.[1]

But instead of trying to come up with solutions to this problem, NRA-backed Republicans continue to block any Congressional attempt to address this. Not only that, they've succeeded in entirely banning federal research on gun violence!

[That's why we're joining a wide coalition of Democrats from across the country to demand immediate action on gun violence. Join us and sign your name today >>](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea4ef/e60883a/7152f179/1442a311/545726410/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "http://go.boldpac.com/Stop-Gun-Violence?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326")

While President Obama is leading the way with historic executive actions to expand the number of background checks performed, _it 's still not enough._

Republicans are already mounting lawsuits against the executive order, and we still need Congress to present a comprehensive and lasting solution.

Friends, it's our responsibility to hold our elected leaders accountable. _We can and we must do more._
